india_trends.title: Keystone Realtors targets pre-sales worth Rs 10,000 cr by FY30
india_trends.summary: Keystone Realtors aims for Rs 10,000 crore in pre-sales by 2029-30. The company achieved Rs 4,022 crore in pre-sales for FY25, a 33% year-on-year increase. Strong project launches and business development fueled this growth. Keystone Realtors plans expansion into Pune, Nagpur, and Nashik. The compan

india_trends.title: NSE inks 80-year lease with MMRDA for 2.7-acre BKC land for Rs 1,684 crore
india_trends.summary: The National Stock Exchange of India has made a bold move by leasing a coveted 2.7-acre site in the bustling Bandra-Kurla Complex of Mumbai for the next 80 years, with a lease premium amounting to Rs 1,684 crore.

india_trends.title: India celebrated Mother’s Day with 13,039 cakes an hour and Rs 1 lakh-plus dinners: Swiggy
india_trends.summary: Mother's Day saw a significant surge in food delivery and dining out across India, with Swiggy reporting a 26.24% rise in food orders and a 71.8% jump in premium restaurant bookings. Consumers splurged on cakes and family dinners, with peak demand for cakes occurring between 7 pm and 8 pm.

india_trends.title: Sebi proposes cash settlement for select agri derivatives to revive volumes
india_trends.summary: Sebi's proposal marks a significant policy shift for India’s agricultural derivatives market, where compulsory physical settlement has long been mandatory to ensure alignment between futures and spot prices and curb excessive speculation.

india_trends.title: India revises GDP release calendar, annual and Q4 figures now due on June 7
india_trends.summary: India's National Statistics Office has revised the annual GDP data release schedule, moving it from the last working day of May to June 7 annually. This change, effective from FY26 data, aims to enhance the quality and robustness of national accounts. The first revised release will be on June 5, 202

india_trends.title: Quality standards key to manufacturing push; toy sector turned net exporter after QCOs: Consumer Affairs Secretary Nidhi
india_trends.summary: India is staking its manufacturing ambition on quality compliance over cost, with QCOs now covering 723 products and the toy sector cited as a conversion success.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Dixon Technologies Q4 Results: Cons PAT falls 36% YoY as topline grows 2%; Rs 10/share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: Dixon Technologies reported a 36% YoY drop in Q4 consolidated PAT to Rs 256 crore despite a 2% rise in revenue to Rs 10,511 crore. EBITDA improved 9%, while the board recommended a Rs 10 per share dividend. The stock fell over 6% after the earnings announcement.

india_trends.title: Bodo Moller Chemie opens warehouse facility in Bengaluru
india_trends.summary: Bodo Moller Chemie has launched a new aerospace warehouse in Bengaluru. This facility will supply advanced materials to aviation and industrial manufacturers. It supports both civilian and military production, along with repair operations. The company sees significant growth potential in India's aer

india_trends.title: Quote of the Day | John Rogers: "The ability to outperform in financial markets requires creativity, vision and the ability to see what others cannot.”
india_trends.summary: Veteran investor John Rogers emphasised that outperforming in financial markets demands creativity, vision, and the ability to perceive what others miss. Success hinges on independent thinking, connecting trends, and challenging narratives, rather than following the crowd.

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea board to weigh fundraise through equity after AGR relief
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea board will consider raising funds via equity shares and warrants as sentiment improves after AGR relief and regulatory clarity. india_trends.title: Maruti Suzuki selects 6 start-ups to co-create new-age tech-based biz solutions
india_trends.summary: Maruti Suzuki India has chosen six startups for its accelerator program. These companies will develop new technology solutions. india_trends.title: ICAI to push for curbing foreign travel, other forex-saving ways among its members, officers
india_trends.summary: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India will soon ask members and officers to save foreign exchange.
